sourcesContent:
# composition-and-boundary fixture: arrows, this/@, ternary,
# update ops, ?. in every applicable matrix position with trivia at block
# boundaries. Inapplicable cells:
#   - arrows in member-object/call-callee/argument position need block
#     bodies inside parens — INDENT is suppressed inside brackets until
#     the layout pass
#   - update targets are SimpleAssignable by grammar (no literals)
#   - `?`/ternary and `?.` compose freely below
def pick(a)
  return a ? a : 0

make = (base) ->
  @base = base
  @base++
  bump = (n) =>
    n + @base
  bump(1)

t1 = pick(3)
t2 = i > 0 ? i-- : ++i

# trivia at a block boundary

check = ->
  flag = counter?.n ? 1 : 0
  flag++

  # trivia inside a function body

  flag

s = t2 ? "some" : "none"
u = counter?.n
i++
